comment.description: Additional comment or description for the RBAC role endpoint.

created_at.description: Unix epoch when the resource was created.

endpoint.description: The endpoint associated with the RBAC role.

negative.description: Indicates whether the RBAC role has negative permissions for the endpoint.

role.description: The RBAC role associated with the endpoint.

updated_at.description: Unix epoch when the resource was last updated.

workspace.description: The workspace associated with the endpoint.

x-speakeasy-transform-from-api.jq:
.
| if .role != null and .role.id != null then . + { role_id: .role.id } else . end
| del(.role)

x-speakeasy-transform-to-api.jq:
.
| if .role_id != null then .role = { id: .role_id } else . end
| del(.role_id)
